# Dermasculpt Clinic
> Premium Skin & Laser Specialists in Bangalore.

## Core Services
- [Laser Hair Reduction](https://www.dermasculptclinic.com/laser-hair-removal-jayanagar.html): Advanced triple-wavelength laser technology for permanent hair reduction in Jayanagar.
- [Acne & Pimples Treatment](https://www.dermasculptclinic.com/pimples-acne-treatment-jayanagar.html): Medical-grade acne protocols and light therapy.
- [Pigmentation Treatment](https://www.dermasculptclinic.com/pigmentation-treatment-jayanagar.html): Specialized correction for melasma, sunspots, and uneven tone.
- [PRP & GFC Hair Loss](https://www.dermasculptclinic.com/prp-gfc-hair-loss-jayanagar.html): Natural follicle regrowth stimulation with Platelet-Rich Plasma.
- [Anti-Aging & Aesthetics](https://www.dermasculptclinic.com/botox-dermal-fillers-jayanagar.html): Expert Botox, fillers, and Morpheus RF skin tightening.

## Key Facts
- **Specialist**: Dr. Deepak Devkar (MBBS, DVD) with 18+ years of experience.
- **Location**: Jayanagar 4th Block, Bangalore.
- **Patients**: 20,000+ treated.
- **Rating**: 4.9/5 stars based on 5,400+ reviews.
